  <activity role='triage nurse/ED clinician' action='confirm symptom onset and time last known well' objects='history from patient/witness/EMS' id='activity1_4'/>
  <activity role='triage nurse/ED clinician' action='check vital signs and point-of-care glucose' objects='BP, HR, SpO2, temperature; capillary glucose' id='activity1_2'/>

  <parallelGateway id='parallelgateway1'>
    <branch id='branch1_pg1'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='perform neurological examination' objects='focal neurological deficits; stroke severity on standardized stroke scale (NIHSS or CNS)' id='activity2'/>
      <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='assess focal neurological deficits' objects='level of consciousness, motor/sensory, speech/language, visual fields, coordination' id='activity2_1'/>
      <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='score stroke severity' objects='NIHSS or CNS score documented' id='activity2_2'/>
    </branch>
    <branch id='branch2_pg1'>
      <activity role='ED clinician' action='make patient NPO initially' objects='no oral medication, fluid, or food until swallowing screened' id='activity3'/>
    </branch>
    <branch id='branch3_pg1'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/nursing' action='perform ECG' objects='detect atrial fibrillation and other acute arrhythmias' id='activity4'/>
    </branch>
    <branch id='branch4_pg1'>
      <activity role='nursing/phlebotomy' action='collect blood work' objects='CBC, electrolytes, creatinine, glucose, INR, partial thromboplastin time' id='activity5'/>
      <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway5'>
        <branch condition='troponin clinically indicated' id='branch17_eg5'>
          <activity role='nursing/phlebotomy' action='collect troponin test' objects='troponin' id='activity5_2'/>
        </branch>
        <branch condition='troponin not clinically indicated' id='branch18_eg5'>
          <activity role='ED clinician' action='document troponin not indicated' objects='rationale per protocol' id='activity5_4'/>
        </branch>
      </exclusiveGateway>
    </branch>
    <branch id='branch5_pg1'>
      <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway6'>
        <branch condition='MRI available and appropriate (no contraindications) and will not delay urgent care' id='branch19_eg6'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/diagnostic imaging' action='select MRI for brain imaging' objects='MRI protocol per stroke pathway' id='activity6_1'/>
          <activity role='ED clinician/diagnostic imaging' action='perform brain imaging immediately' objects='MRI' id='activity6_2'/>
        </branch>
        <branch condition='CT preferred/available (or MRI contraindicated/unavailable or would delay)' id='branch20_eg6'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/diagnostic imaging' action='select CT for brain imaging' objects='non-contrast head CT protocol per stroke pathway' id='activity6_3'/>
          <activity role='ED clinician/diagnostic imaging' action='perform brain imaging immediately' objects='CT' id='activity6_4'/>
        </branch>
      </exclusiveGateway>
      <activity role='radiologist/qualified provider' action='interpret brain imaging immediately' objects='CT and/or MRI results' id='activity7'/>
    </branch>
    <branch id='branch6_pg1'>
      <activity role='ED clinician' action='defer chest x-ray if it would delay assessment for thrombolysis' objects='chest x-ray (do not delay thrombolysis assessment)' id='activity8'/>
    </branch>
  </parallelGateway>

  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway1'>
    <branch condition='patient is not alert within the first 24 hours' id='branch7_eg1'>
      <activity role='nursing/ED clinician' action='monitor closely within first 24 hours and screen swallowing when clinically appropriate' objects='swallowing ability screening' id='activity9'/>
    </branch>
    <branch condition='patient is alert' id='branch8_eg1'>
      <activity role='nursing/ED clinician' action='screen swallowing ability as part of initial assessment and before any oral medication, fluid, or food' objects='simple, valid, reliable bedside swallowing screening protocol' id='activity10'/>
      <activity role='nursing/ED clinician' action='perform bedside swallow screen' objects='validated bedside swallow screening protocol result' id='activity10_1'/>
      <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway7'>
        <branch condition='swallow screen passed' id='branch21_eg7'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/nursing' action='initiate safe oral intake plan' objects='oral meds/fluids/food per protocol and positioning guidance' id='activity10_2'/>
        </branch>
        <branch condition='swallow screen failed or inconclusive' id='branch22_eg7'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/nursing' action='continue NPO and use non-oral routes as needed' objects='NPO maintained; alternative medication/fluids plan' id='activity10_3'/>
        </branch>
      </exclusiveGateway>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>

  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway2'>
    <branch condition='features indicating dysphagia or pulmonary aspiration are present' id='branch9_eg2'>
      <activity role='speech-language pathologist/appropriately trained specialist' action='perform full clinical swallowing assessment and advise' objects='swallowing ability; required consistency of diet and fluids' id='activity11'/>
    </branch>
    <branch condition='no features indicating dysphagia or pulmonary aspiration' id='branch10_eg2'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/nursing' action='continue standard diet/fluids plan per screening results' objects='diet and fluids per bedside screening protocol' id='activity12'/>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>

  <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='apply standardized TIA triage tool to determine care location' objects='TIA triage tool; patient risk profile' id='activity13'/>
  <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='risk stratify using standardized TIA tool' objects='TIA risk score/criteria and clinical factors' id='activity13_1'/>
  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway8'>
    <branch condition='requires admission/urgent in-hospital stroke workup' id='branch23_eg8'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='arrange admission/transfer to appropriate acute stroke service' objects='bed request/transfer coordination' id='activity13_2'/>
    </branch>
    <branch condition='appropriate for expedited outpatient pathway' id='branch24_eg8'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='refer to rapid-assessment TIA/minor stroke unit or TIA/stroke prevention clinic' objects='referral order and appointment pathway' id='activity13_3'/>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>

  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway3'>
    <branch condition='TIA or minor (nondisabling) stroke within 48 hours of symptom onset OR fluctuating motor or speech symptoms' id='branch11_eg3'>
      <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway4'>
        <branch condition='clearly not a candidate for carotid artery revascularization' id='branch12_eg4'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='document non-candidacy for carotid revascularization and do not perform immediate neck vascular imaging' objects='carotid revascularization candidacy assessment' id='activity14'/>
        </branch>
        <branch condition='candidate/uncertain candidacy for carotid artery revascularization' id='branch13_eg4'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/diagnostic imaging' action='perform immediate vascular imaging of neck arteries' objects='carotid ultrasound or CTA or MRA' id='activity15'/>
        </branch>
      </exclusiveGateway>
    </branch>
    <branch condition='all other patients (presenting beyond 48 hours) with TIA or ischemic stroke' id='branch14_eg3'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/diagnostic imaging' action='perform vascular imaging as soon as possible' objects='vascular imaging of brain and neck arteries' id='activity16'/>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>

  <parallelGateway id='parallelgateway2'>
    <branch id='branch15_pg2'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/stroke prevention team' action='provide cross-continuum secondary prevention assessments and therapies' objects='secondary prevention (Modules 5 and 10) for admitted or ED-discharged patients' id='activity17'/>
      <parallelGateway id='parallelgateway3'>
        <branch id='branch25_pg3'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/stroke prevention team' action='initiate antithrombotic/anticoagulation plan as appropriate' objects='antiplatelet/anticoagulation decision aligned to findings and contraindications' id='activity17_1'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch26_pg3'>
          <activity role='ED clinician/stroke prevention team' action='initiate risk-factor management and arrange follow-up/referral' objects='BP/diabetes/lipid/smoking management plan; clinic follow-up/referral orders' id='activity17_2'/>
        </branch>
      </parallelGateway>
    </branch>
    <branch id='branch16_pg2'>
      <activity role='ED clinician/stroke team' action='identify recommendations not applicable to TIA or minor (nondisabling) stroke and tailor pathway accordingly' objects='applicability check for TIA/minor stroke' id='activity18'/>
    </branch>
  </parallelGateway>
</process>)</API>
